message:
feat(test): add proptest properties for disk WAL, CRC32, and MuxMutation

Extends proptest_wal_engine.rs with 11 new property-based tests for the
disk persistence layer (41 total). Properties cover:

- DiskWal persist/reload roundtrip with arbitrary MuxMutation sequences
- Sequence number continuity across sessions
- compact_and_rewrite produces corruption-free files
- Crash recovery (garbage tail) preserves all good entries
- MuxMutation serde roundtrip for all variants
- exceeds_max_size monotonicity
- file_size grows with each append
- Replay identity: WAL replay matches direct mutation application

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
